posts.content: Huge turnouts expected for political rallies in Kusheshwar Asthan assembly constituency. Development issues are taking center stage! #KusheshwarAsthan #BiharElections2025
How is the candidate ground outreach in Kusheshwar Asthan? Hearing that the MGNREGA work distribution and local water issues will decide the swing voters here.
Public Opinion in Kusheshwar Asthan: Ground survey of what rural voters want from the next MLA.
